title: Another Of The Same. (Obedience.)
content:
No man so well a kingdom rules as he
    Who hath himself obeyed the sovereignty.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Another Of The Same. (Obedience.)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
